image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about publication bias than social media does.
Context visual: Publication bias occurs when studies with positive results are more likely to be published, skewing our understanding.
Escalation visual: Imagine relying on incomplete data to make health decisions. Frightening, right?
Evidence visual: Studies show that more than 50% of negative results never see the light of day.
Payoff visual: This means your health decisions could be based on a distorted view of reality.
Cta visual: Stay informed. Question the sources. Like and follow for more insights on science.
